About the AZ Awards
The AZ Awards is AZURE’s international architecture and design competition, recognizing excellence and innovation, and showcasing the world’s best projects, products and ideas.
Now in its 16th year

Launched by AZURE in 2011, the AZ Awards has grown in size, scope and momentum to be internationally recognized for its influence in the global design and architecture spheres, and

Award Winners

Each year, the prestigious AZ Awards Jury convenes in March to review the submissions, select the finalists and among them the winners of AZURE’s international competition.

The shortlisted submissions are then celebrated in June as Winner and/or People’s Choice, or Award of Merit.
